title: RQZ-Golf v1: Depth recurrence for parameter efficiency
author: TheCause
architecture: U-Net-style encoder/decoder with a recurrent shared layer

data.description: Replaces some unique layers with a single shared recurrent layer applied multiple times to save parameters while increasing effective depth.
Shares weights across recurrent passes of the same layer.
Uses learned per-pass embeddings so the recurrent layer is aware of which iteration it is on.

novel_contributions: Depth recurrence using a shared recurrent layer applied K times to reduce parameter count.
Learned iteration embeddings to distinguish recurrent passes.
Ability to increase K at inference time for better BPB without changing model size.
U-Net-style encoder/decoder with skip connections combined with recurrent depth sharing.
